OK, so clicking on the left panel's row 39 horizontal bar at col 9 didn't change anything. The left panel's row 39 is still 'BggggggwwwggwwwggwwwggwwwggggggB', and the right panel still has all elements removed.
So clicking on the left panel doesn't do anything. The left panel is just a "target" display, not an interactive area.
Let me reconsider the puzzle. The left panel shows the "target" state, and the right panel is the "current" state. The goal is to make the right panel match the left panel.
The left panel has:
- Row 33: horizontal bars 'BBB' (black) - REMOVED
- Rows 35-37: vertical bars 'w' (light gray) - PRESENT
- Row 39: horizontal bars 'www' (light gray) - PRESENT
- Rows 41-43: vertical bars 'w' (light gray) - PRESENT
- Row 45: horizontal bars 'www' (light gray) - PRESENT
- Rows 47-49: vertical bars 'w' (light gray) - PRESENT
The right panel currently has all elements removed (all black). But it should match the left panel, which means:
- Row 33: horizontal bars 'BBB' (black) - REMOVED (done)
- Rows 35-37: vertical bars 'w' (light gray) - PRESENT (need to restore!)
- Row 39: horizontal bars 'www' (light gray) - PRESENT (need to restore!)
- Rows 41-43: vertical bars 'w' (light gray) - PRESENT (need to restore!)
- Row 45: horizontal bars 'www' (light gray) - PRESENT (need to restore!)
- Rows 47-49: vertical bars 'w' (light gray) - PRESENT (need to restore!)
But I can't restore elements. So maybe I need to find a way to reset the right panel.
Actually, wait. Let me look at the right panel more carefully. The right panel shows:
- Row 33: 'BBBWWBBBWWBBBWWBBB' - horizontal bars are 'BBB' (black)
- Rows 35-37: 'WBWWWWBWWWWBWWWWBW' - vertical bars are 'B' (black)
But the initial right panel showed:
- Row 33: 'wwwWWwwwWWwwwWWwww' - horizontal bars are 'www' (light gray)
- Rows 35-37: 'WwWWWWwWWWWwWWWWwW' - vertical bars are 'w' (light gray)
So the elements changed from 'w'/'www' (light gray) to 'B'/'BBB' (black). This means clicking on elements removes them (changes them from light gray to black).
But wait, maybe clicking on elements TOGGLES them, not just removes them. Let me try clicking on a removed element to see if it restores it.
Actually, looking at the right panel, the vertical bars are 'B' (black), not 'w' (light gray). If I click on them again, maybe they'll toggle back to 'w' (light gray).
Let me try clicking on the right panel's row 35 vertical bar at col 39.
